race.comment: GLAM (2) improved sharply on her sixth two starts back at Ballina with a win over 1260m at Ballina five weeks ago, getting home by 0.7 lengths after being prominent at the turn. Nicely placed to take this out. PRINCE RUPERT (8) finished out of the money two starts back then he was never in contention and was beaten 3.5 lengths when fifth in a 1005m contest at Tuncurry a week ago. Finds a nice race and can play a significant role. SIGLO DE ORO (4) last appeared when he finished eighth over 1110m at this track on October 19. Makes plenty of appeal. VEGA NOVA (7) raced below his best last time when seventh over 1100m at Toowoomba. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time.
